message:
test(transport): add audit regression tests for stream.rs edge cases

Add 4 tests: MergedStream removal index adjustment when removing before
current, ChannelStream closed-after-waiter-registration path,
collect_to_set error propagation halts collection, VecStream size_hint
tracks remaining items.

Confirmed existing lost-wakeup race fix (re-check after waiter
registration with self-wake) is correct.

All 20 transport stream tests pass. Audit verdict: SOUND (with
pre-existing fix for lost-wakeup race already applied).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
